_comment: RC-0001 — First real-case validation. Mixed income: salary + 44AD gig delivery + other sources. New regime. Income below basic exemption → zero tax, full TDS refund. Expected LV = rule_gap (engine does not implement 44AD presumptive income or head 5 other sources).

head_1_salary.note: Entire salary categorised as Profits in Lieu of Salary (ProfitsInSalary); regular Salary component = 0

human_expected._comment: Source: filed ITR4 JSON (receipt 649949100260626). All figures verified from ITR. Regime = new regime; both regimes yield same taxable income and zero tax since total income < basic exemption in either regime.

notes: Income breakdown: salary 162598 (gross 237598 – std deduction 75000) + 44AD gig 3379 (6% of 56309 bank receipts) + other sources 2587 (FD interest 2108 + savings 475 + dividend 4) = 168564, rounded to 168560 by ITR (Section 288A). No Chapter VI-A deductions claimed (consistent with new regime). Standard deduction 75000 applies to both regimes per Finance (No.2) Act 2024. Filing mandatory under 139(1) seventh proviso: TDS credits (56309) exceed 1 lakh. 80TTA (savings interest 475) available under old regime but not claimed; no impact as tax is 0 regardless. Entire salary classified as Profits in Lieu of Salary; tax treatment identical to regular salary under Head 1. DEFECTS FOUND AND FIXED IN THIS CASE: (1) Old regime standard deduction was 50000 in tax table — corrected to 75000 per Finance (No.2) Act 2024 amendment to Section 16(ia). This affected all 16 GMs and 2 test cases; all updated and re-verified. REMAINING RULE GAPS: (1) Section 288A rounding not implemented — engine produces 168564, ITR shows 168560 (delta +4). Low priority: no tax impact. (2) demand_amount not produced for refund cases — engine produces None instead of 0. Minor gap in output completeness.

defects_found: D-001: Old regime standard deduction was 50000 in tables/2024/tax_slabs.json and tables/2024/deductions.json. Should be 75000 per Finance (No.2) Act 2024, Section 16(ia) amendment. Fixed in this session. 15 GM expected files and 2 test cases (T-0028, T-0029) updated.
rule_gaps_remaining: RG-001: Section 288A income rounding not implemented — engine produces pre-rounding figure (168564); ITR shows 168560. Delta +4. Zero tax impact for this case.
RG-002: demand_amount not produced for refund cases — engine returns None; should return 0.
case_data_corrections: Added 'amount': 3379 to head_3_business entry — engine uses item.get('amount', 0) to sum business income; original case had only 'presumptive_income' which the engine does not recognise as the income amount field.
